title: scutellaria tuvensis
intro: Scutellaria tuvensis, also known as Tuven's Skullcap, is a perennial plant species in the Lamiaceae family, traditionally used in herbal medicine. The medicinal properties of Scutellaria tuvensis are attributed to its flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of the plant are said to include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Scutellaria tuvensis can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
